Metadata.homeTitle: Precisar · Empower how you use technology
Metadata.homeDescription: Empower how you use technology. Home with hero, rotating verbs, ticker, and stacked sections. Precisar 2026.

homeConvoca.intro: Every day, more information is produced and circulated than we can process.

chile.outro: In Chile, connectivity is already a given. The challenge now is different: better tools to understand what we see, compare information, and exercise sounder judgment in digital life.

propuesta.body1: Information arrives in fragments. AI answers before you finish your question. Media change faster than we can make sense of them. And yet, everyone already navigates all of that—in their own way, with what they have.
propuesta.body2: At Precisar we strengthen that capacity: so more people can interpret the information they receive and build their own meaning.

homePrograms.title: Programs
homePrograms.stackHeadline: Millions are connected. With judgment, many are still missing.
homePrograms.body: We design tools, content, and training experiences—in person and online—that strengthen critical thinking, digital security, and civic engagement.
homePrograms.stackLinkCiudades: Cities Connected with Purpose — Workshops and support for municipalities to strengthen digital skills across the community.
homePrograms.stackLinkHub: Hub Digital Consciente — Immersive digital culture experiences for all ages, adaptable to any space.
homePrograms.stackLinkAprender: Learn Digital: It's Never Too Late — A programme for older adults who want to connect with more safety and autonomy.
homePrograms.stackLinkPensamientoCritico: Media education for teachers — Tools and resources to help teachers bring critical thinking into the classroom.
homePrograms.stackLinkFuncionarios: Course for public servants — Practical digital skills training for people who work in government.
homePrograms.stackBotOndaManoDesc: For what hits you every day: messages, chains, iffy links, voice notes. It helps you see what's reliable, what signals to check, and how to use AI with judgment — without doing the work for you.
homePrograms.stackBotOndaCivitaDesc: For making sense of the public sphere: the state, laws, the economy, the environment, recent history. Clear, non-partisan language, data, and framing.
homePrograms.stackBotOndaProfesDesc: For teachers and education teams: how to design activities where AI is a tool, not a shortcut; good practice, rubrics, and transparency with students. Supports those who teach.

ciudades.title: Cities Connected with Purpose
ciudades.body: We run workshops and support institutions and municipalities in designing and implementing media and digital literacy strategies. Through participatory diagnostics and community workshops, residents gain skills to access reliable information, develop critical thinking, and participate confidently in the digital environment.

hub.title: Hub Digital Consciente
hub.body: Immersive digital culture experiences for all ages, adaptable to events, municipalities, and educational settings. Through posters, videos, and user-centred interactive applications, we explore topics such as AI, disinformation, and privacy—turning them into participatory experiences that encourage reflection on technology’s impact on society.

aprender.title: Learn Digital: It’s Never Too Late
aprender.body: A programme designed especially for older adults, with in-person and online workshops that combine practical device use, digital safety, and social activities—strengthening their autonomy and connection with family and community.

homeEducacionMediatica.stackHeadline: Understanding media is a skill you learn.
homeEducacionMediatica.stackBody:
Four dimensions for reading the digital world
with more judgment, more awareness, and more autonomy.

homePrecisando.stackHeadline: How information circulates—and what effects it produces.
homePrecisando.stackBody: Precisando is Precisar’s editorial: articles and debate to read the digital environment with more context, judgment, and depth. Explore recent posts and categories.
homePrecisando.stackUnderConstruction: Under construction. Articles will be published here soon.

homeSaberes.stackHeadline: Knowing isn’t hoarding data. It’s knowing what to do with it.
homeSaberes.stackBody: Three collections of open resources—to reflect and broaden perspectives.
